inputs.prompt: Original pitch: Sent 10 days ago pitching an exclusive interview with a university researcher about a new study on urban planning and car dependency. Recipient: Lisa Chen, transport correspondent, The National Post. Follow-up number: First. New info: The study publication date has been confirmed for next Monday — the embargo lifts at 00:01. Urgency: Time-sensitive. Relationship: Cold — no prior contact.
Original pitch: Press release about a bakery award sent 2 weeks ago. Recipient: Food editor, regional newspaper. Follow-up number: First. No new information.

Original pitch: Sent 12 days ago offering an embargoed briefing on NHI's cross-border cancer treatment outcomes study to Hans Eriksen, health correspondent at Politiken. Follow-up number: First. New info: The study has now been picked up by Reuters Health as an embargoed story — Eriksen's window for an exclusive Nordic angle is closing. Urgency: Deadline-critical. Relationship: Met briefly at a conference last year.
